acceptance_criteria: Public timeline shows public posts in reverse chron order; local=true filters to local accounts only; only_media=true filters to posts with media attachments; pagination works
description: Implement the public timeline. Two variants: local=true shows only posts from local accounts (visibility=public); local=false (default) shows all public posts including cached remote posts. Supports max_id, since_id, min_id, limit, only_media params.
design: Local timeline: SELECT from posts WHERE visibility='public' ORDER BY id DESC. Federated: UNION posts and remote_posts WHERE visibility='public'. Exclude boosts from public timeline (they appear in home timeline via the boost wrapper).
title: GET /api/v1/timelines/public (local + federated)
